# Africanmoose 

## Pic of the week
![05.04 - Publish digital garden resource folder/_DSC1232-sunrise.jpg](data:image/png;base64,)
Mount Kilimanjaro sunrise in Amboseli, Kenya. It has been exceedingly dry and this vast place looked just like a desert.
